scripts.infra: docker compose up -d postgres rabbitmq consul
scripts.services: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,red,white,gray" --names "gateway,auth,user-pet,establishment,marketplace,booking,notification,review" "npm run start:dev --prefix api-gateway" "npm run start:dev --prefix auth-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix user-pet-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix establishment-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix marketplace-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix booking-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix notification-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix review-service"
scripts.dev: npm run infra && wait-on tcp:5432 tcp:5672 && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,red,white,gray,magenta" --names "gateway,auth,user-pet,establishment,marketplace,booking,notification,review,flutter" "npm run start:dev --prefix api-gateway" "npm run start:dev --prefix auth-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix user-pet-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix establishment-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix marketplace-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix booking-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix notification-service" "npm run start:dev --prefix review-service" "npm run start --prefix mypet_app"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix api-gateway && npm install --prefix auth-service && npm install --prefix user-pet-service && npm install --prefix establishment-service && npm install --prefix marketplace-service && npm install --prefix booking-service && npm install --prefix notification-service && npm install --prefix review-service
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix api-gateway && npm run build --prefix auth-service && npm run build --prefix user-pet-service && npm run build --prefix establishment-service && npm run build --prefix marketplace-service && npm run build --prefix booking-service && npm run build --prefix notification-service && npm run build --prefix review-service
